# External pilot invitation

I am looking for one project owner who wants to improve a bounded part of an
existing website or app with design-ai.

The pilot covers one page, screen, or user flow. It produces a source-linked design
review, an owner-approved implementation scope, verification evidence, and a
before/after comparison. It does not require production credentials, analytics
exports, customer data, or publication of private source.

You remain the approval owner. Source inspection, target changes, dependency or
migration work, commit, push, deployment, and external writes stay separate gates.
You may stop the pilot at any time before a new action begins.

The retained evidence can be limited to references, finding decisions, approval
events, verification results, and feedback wording you explicitly approve. Private
screenshots and logs can remain in your project.

To participate, reply with:

- the project role or handle you want recorded;
- confirmation that you can authorize the target repository or artifact;
- one page, screen, or flow you want to improve;
- whether a local run or safe preview is available;
- whether evidence collection and bounded target mutation are allowed.

A reply is an intake signal, not final consent. The exact target, selectors, data
boundary, retention, and stop conditions are recorded separately before inspection.
